name: Guacamole Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water in a small saucepan.
2. Add bouillon cube and salt to the softened gelatin.
3. Heat, stirring constantly, until the gelatin and bouillon are dissolved; cool slightly.
4. Combine avocado, sour cream, green onion, lemon juice, and hot sauce in a separate bowl.
5. Stir in the gelatin mixture.
6. Pour the mixture into a 3-cup mold and refrigerate until firm.
7. Unmold, garnish as desired, and serve with crackers.
Yield: about 2 2/3 cups
